# `math cbrt` for [math](/commands/categories/math.md)

<div class='command-title'>Returns the real-valued cube root of the input number.</div>

## Signature

```> math cbrt {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input        | output       |
| ------------ | ------------ |
| number       | float        |
| list&lt;number&gt; | list&lt;float&gt;  |
| range        | list&lt;number&gt; |
## Examples

Compute the cube root of each number in a list.
```nu
> [8 -27] | math cbrt
╭───┬───────╮
│ 0 │  2.00 │
│ 1 │ -3.00 │
╰───┴───────╯

```
